title: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
description: Central sector scheme providing income support of ₹6,000 per year to eligible landholding farmer families, paid in three equal instalments of ₹2,000 each.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmer families with cultivable land as per state/UT records. Exclusions apply for income tax payers, constitutional post holders, etc.
application_steps: Verify land records with local patwari/Lekhpal

title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Comprehensive crop insurance scheme covering yield losses due to non-preventable natural risks from pre-sowing to post-harvest.
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas, including sharecroppers and tenant farmers.
benefits: Low premium rates; claim for crop damage from calamities, pests, diseases
application_steps: Enrol through bank/ CSC during crop season

title: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
short: Affordable credit for crops and allied activities
description: Provides timely credit for crop production, post-harvest expenses, farm maintenance, and short-term working capital needs at concessional interest.
eligibility: Farmers, tenant farmers, oral lessees, sharecroppers, SHGs/JLG of farmers.
benefits: Flexible limit; interest subvention on timely repayment
application_steps: Submit land records / proof of cultivation

title: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Promotes soil test based balanced use of fertilizers through Soil Health Cards issued every 2 years.
eligibility: All farmers; contact local agriculture department or soil testing lab.
benefits: Custom NPK and micronutrient recommendations; reduced input cost
application_steps: Contact Krishi Vigyan Kendra or block agriculture office
Receive SHC with fertilizer dose advice

title: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY)
description: Accelerates irrigation coverage and improves water use efficiency through micro-irrigation, watershed development, and per-drop more crop.
eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, and state irrigation projects as per state plan guidelines.
benefits: Subsidy on drip/sprinkler systems; watershed and water harvesting support
application_steps: Submit land and water source documents

title: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
description: Promotes organic farming through cluster approach, PGS certification, and organic value chain development.
eligibility: Farmers willing to adopt organic practices in groups/clusters.
benefits: Financial assistance per hectare for organic conversion and certification

title: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM)
description: Provides financial assistance for purchase of agricultural machinery and equipment to reduce drudgery and improve efficiency.
eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, custom hiring centres, entrepreneurs as per state rules.
benefits: Subsidy on tractors, tillers, planters, harvesters, etc.
application_steps: Apply on state agriculture department portal

title: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture (MIDH)
description: Supports production, post-harvest management, and marketing of horticulture crops including fruits, vegetables, spices.
eligibility: Horticulture farmers, FPOs, cooperatives in participating states.
benefits: Assistance for planting material, protected cultivation, cold chain

title: National Mission on Sustainable Agriculture (NMSA)
description: Promotes resource conservation, soil health, water efficiency, and climate resilient practices.
eligibility: Farmers adopting rainfed area development, soil health, water conservation practices.
benefits: Support for vermicompost, water harvesting, drought tolerant seeds

title: Maharashtra Balasaheb Thackeray Shetkari Samruddhi Yojana
description: Maharashtra state scheme for farmer welfare including aspects of crop loan and distress support (check current state notifications).
eligibility: Maharashtra farmers as per state government notification.
application_steps: Track at SETU / MahaDBT if linked

title: Rajasthan Mandi Subsidy / Market Infrastructure
description: Rajasthan schemes for agricultural marketing infrastructure and farmer access to regulated markets.
eligibility: Farmers and traders operating in Rajasthan mandis.
benefits: Improved mandi access and state marketing support

title: Telangana Rythu Bandhu
description: Telangana government provides investment support of ₹ per acre per season to farmers owning agricultural land (verify current rates on official portal).
eligibility: Telangana farmers with pattadar passbook / land ownership records.
benefits: Direct investment support per acre per crop season
application_steps: Link bank account on official portal
